dialogue.speaker: Elle
dialogue.text: It's so good to finally sit down , I've been on my feet all day. Has everyone looked at the menu yet?

dialogue.speaker: Kai
dialogue.text: Same here. I'm thinking the pasta, honestly. Nadia, have you been here before?

dialogue.speaker: Elle
dialogue.text: Sorry , *scratches arm loudly at the table* , bad habit. Nadia, have you tried the fish here?

dialogue.speaker: Nadia
dialogue.text: Ha , I have, actually. The grilled fish is really good. Though… maybe scratch at home next time, Elle?

annotation: Elle scratches their body at the dinner table, which is considered impolite in a restaurant setting.

context.setting_description: A group of friends sit down at a corner table in a busy restaurant for dinner.
context.topic: catching up and deciding what to order

dialogue.speaker: Fatima
dialogue.text: Excuse me, is this seat taken? Long morning already.

dialogue.speaker: Aya
dialogue.text: No, go ahead. Quiet ride so far, which is nice.

dialogue.speaker: Carlos
dialogue.text: Yeah, usually calm this early. Damn , sorry, just missed a message. Fatima, what stop are you getting off at?

dialogue.speaker: Fatima
dialogue.text: Oh , just the university, a few stops up. Though, maybe watch the language? There are kids on here.

annotation: Carlos curses loudly on the bus, disturbing other passengers.

context.setting_description: Passengers are seated on a city bus during the morning commute.

dialogue.speaker: Rosa
dialogue.text: Finally. I really needed this after this week. What are you getting?

dialogue.speaker: George
dialogue.text: Probably just a beer. Cheers to making it through.

dialogue.speaker: Rosa
dialogue.text: Cheers. *slurps drink loudly* , oh, sorry. I was really thirsty.

dialogue.speaker: George
dialogue.text: Ha , I could tell. Slow down a bit. Should we get some food too?

annotation: Rosa slurps their drink audibly at the bar, which others nearby find off-putting.

context.setting_description: Two colleagues have stopped into a bar after work for a casual drink.
context.topic: unwinding after a long work week

dialogue.speaker: Erik
dialogue.text: Did you get to practise the new sequence? I'm still working on the footwork.

dialogue.speaker: Yara
dialogue.text: A little. Once we run it a few times it'll click. Is the instructor here yet?

dialogue.speaker: Dani
dialogue.text: HEY Erik , CAN YOU GRAB THE SPEAKER FROM THE CORNER?

dialogue.speaker: Erik
dialogue.text: Okay , but that was really loud. The instructor's right next door, Dani.

annotation: Dani yells across the dance studio unnecessarily, disrupting the calm rehearsal environment.

context.setting_description: Students are warming up before a contemporary dance class in a studio.

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: The line's moving fast today. Do they still do almond croissants on weekends?

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: I think so , I saw them in the case when I walked in. *wipes nose with hand and reaches for the shared menu*

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: Uh , Alice, you just wiped your nose and then grabbed the menu. That's a bit unhygienic.

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: Yeah… maybe grab a napkin? There are other people touching that.

annotation: Alice wipes their nose with their hand then touches a shared menu in a bakery, which is unhygienic and inconsiderate.

context.setting_description: Customers queue inside a small bakery on a Saturday morning.

norm_text: bakery [BEHAVIOR] wipe their nose with their hand

dialogue.speaker: Aisha
dialogue.text: Good session today. Finally hit a personal best on the bench. How was your leg day?

dialogue.speaker: Miguel
dialogue.text: Rough , my quads are already aching. I overdid the squats.

dialogue.speaker: Yuki
dialogue.text: *props feet up on the bench next to Miguel* Yeah those benches get a lot of use. What's your next set?

dialogue.speaker: Miguel
dialogue.text: Yuki , people sit on those, you know. Please take your feet off.

annotation: Yuki puts their feet on a gym bench, which is disrespectful and unhygienic.

context.setting_description: Members are resting between sets in the weights area of a gym.

norm_text: gym [BEHAVIOR] put your feet on the benches

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: Morning. Heading to the airport , 7 a.m. flight. Hopefully traffic's okay.

dialogue.speaker: Rex
dialogue.text: Should be fine at this hour. Big trip?

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: Just a conference. So , are you married? Do you have kids? How long have you been driving?

dialogue.speaker: Rex
dialogue.text: I'd prefer to keep that private, if you don't mind. We should arrive in about twenty minutes.

annotation: Maya asks the taxi driver a series of intrusive personal questions, making the driver uncomfortable.

context.setting_description: A passenger rides in a taxi across the city in the early morning.
context.topic: a routine taxi ride to the airport

norm_text: taxi [BEHAVIOR] ask the driver personal questions

dialogue.speaker: Suki
dialogue.text: Morning. Eight, please, if you don't mind.

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: Sure. Morning. Busy day ahead?

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: *pulls out a tissue and blows nose loudly* Sorry , allergies.

dialogue.speaker: Suki
dialogue.text: It's a pretty small space… maybe save that for outside?

annotation: Maya blows their nose loudly in a crowded elevator, making others uncomfortable in the enclosed space.

context.setting_description: Several people ride a small elevator up to their offices.

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: I cannot find where I parked. Did you come in from the north entrance?

dialogue.speaker: Ravi
dialogue.text: Yeah, I'm near the trolley bay. I'll walk with you.

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: Hey! *walking past shirtless* It's so hot I just took my shirt off in the car park. Too much?

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: A little, yeah. People are around. Might want to put it back on.

annotation: Hugo walks through a public parking lot shirtless, which many bystanders find inappropriate.

context.setting_description: People walk through a parking lot on a warm afternoon.
context.topic: heading to and from the shopping centre

dialogue.speaker: Ravi
dialogue.text: Great match so far. Both players are really evenly matched.

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: Not sure who's favoured , the one in blue has a stronger serve though.

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: BOO! Come on, you can do better than that! *directed at the player in red*

dialogue.speaker: Ravi
dialogue.text: Okay… that's a bit much. Tennis crowds are usually quiet, Clara.

annotation: Clara boos the opposing player from the stands, which violates the respectful silence expected at tennis matches.

context.setting_description: Spectators watch a tennis match from the stands at a local club tournament.

norm_text: tennis court [BEHAVIOR] boo the other player

dialogue.speaker: Sara
dialogue.text: These machines take forever. Big project?

dialogue.speaker: Bashir
dialogue.text: Just handouts for a workshop tomorrow. You?

dialogue.speaker: Sara
dialogue.text: Training materials. Are you local to this area?

dialogue.speaker: Bashir
dialogue.text: Yeah, just a few blocks away. Small world. Good luck with the training.

annotation: Sara makes friendly small talk with a stranger while waiting, which is entirely appropriate.

context.setting_description: Two customers wait at a copy centre while their jobs print.
context.topic: passing time while waiting for copies

norm_text: copy center [BEHAVIOR] make small talk with someone

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: That last section was steep. Nice view though. How far are you going?

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: All the way to the summit if my legs hold up. You?

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: Same! *opens arms* Sorry , I hug when I'm happy. That okay?

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: Totally fine , I was thinking the same thing. What a climb.

annotation: Clara spontaneously hugs Hugo at a rest point, which both parties welcome warmly.

context.setting_description: Two hikers meet at a rest point partway up a mountain trail.
context.topic: resting on a trail and sharing the experience

dialogue.speaker: Dani
dialogue.text: The usual for you? I'm already in the queue.

dialogue.speaker: Erik
dialogue.text: Please , flat white, no sugar. I'm dying for caffeine.

dialogue.speaker: Dani
dialogue.text: Same. *passes over the cup* Here you go. How's the new job?

dialogue.speaker: Erik
dialogue.text: Honestly so much better. I actually like going in. Thanks for the coffee.

annotation: Dani orders and shares coffee with a friend at a café, which is perfectly normal behaviour.

context.setting_description: Two friends meet at their usual café for a weekday catch-up.

dialogue.speaker: Felix
dialogue.text: I always get nervous in waiting rooms. Is it just me?

dialogue.speaker: Lena
dialogue.text: Not just you. I check my phone to distract myself , doesn't really work though.

dialogue.speaker: Omar
dialogue.text: *laughs loudly* Sorry , I just saw the funniest thing. I'll keep it down.

dialogue.speaker: Felix
dialogue.text: No worries. Honestly, laughter helps. What was it?

annotation: Omar laughs loudly in a dentist's waiting room, which is understandable and not seriously disruptive.

context.setting_description: Patients sit in a dentist's waiting room.

dialogue.speaker: Quinn
dialogue.text: I always feel calmer after coming here. It's nice to just pause.

dialogue.speaker: Diana
dialogue.text: Same. The readings today were particularly good.

dialogue.speaker: Quinn
dialogue.text: *makes eye contact and nods warmly at Diana* , I'm glad you came. It means a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Diana
dialogue.text: Of course. Wouldn't miss it.

annotation: Quinn makes respectful eye contact with Diana during a chapel service, which is entirely appropriate.

context.setting_description: Members of a congregation sit in a chapel during a reflective service.
context.topic: participating in a calm Sunday service

norm_text: church or chapel [BEHAVIOR] look someone in the eye

dialogue.speaker: Nico
dialogue.text: Alright , Femi, I'll put you on comms again, you're good at it. Isla, you can take logistics.

dialogue.speaker: Femi
dialogue.text: Works for me. What does logistics involve exactly?

dialogue.speaker: Isla
dialogue.text: Actually , Nico, you've given Femi the easier role without asking the rest of us. That's the third time this semester.

dialogue.speaker: Nico
dialogue.text: That's fair to flag. Let's do it properly , everyone say which role they prefer.

annotation: Nico shows favouritism by assigning the easier role to Femi without consulting the group.

context.setting_description: Student club members gather on campus to discuss upcoming event assignments.
context.topic: distributing tasks for the semester showcase

dialogue.speaker: Femi
dialogue.text: Whoever gets the highest score on this one buys the next round of tokens. Deal?

dialogue.speaker: Isla
dialogue.text: Deal. I've played this one before , watch this. *quietly presses reset on the machine while ahead* New high score!

dialogue.speaker: Femi
dialogue.text: Wait , Isla, did you just press reset mid-game? That's cheating.

dialogue.speaker: Nico
dialogue.text: I saw that too. Doesn't count, Isla. You have to play it clean.

annotation: Isla cheats during an arcade game by resetting the score, which is unfair to the other players.

context.setting_description: A group of friends spend an afternoon at an arcade.
context.topic: competing on games for top scores

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: I need to make copies of this before the exam. Queue's not too bad today.

dialogue.speaker: Rex
dialogue.text: Yeah, I just finished mine. What are you copying?

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: The whole textbook, actually. Easier than buying it.

dialogue.speaker: Rex
dialogue.text: That's a copyrighted book, Maya. You can't just copy the whole thing , that's not legal.

annotation: Maya photocopies an entire copyrighted textbook, which is an intellectual property violation.

context.setting_description: A student uses a self-service machine at a campus copy centre.

norm_text: copy center [BEHAVIOR] make a copy of a copyrighted work

dialogue.speaker: Nico
dialogue.text: Service starts at ten. Are we all going together?

dialogue.speaker: Isla
dialogue.text: I was planning to, yes. Femi, are you coming?

dialogue.speaker: Femi
dialogue.text: I'd rather not today, honestly.

dialogue.speaker: Nico
dialogue.text: You don't have a choice , everyone in this house goes on Sundays. That's just how it is.

annotation: Nico forces Femi to attend a religious service against their wishes, disregarding personal autonomy.

context.setting_description: A family discusses plans for attending a Sunday church service.
context.topic: making arrangements for the weekly service

norm_text: church or chapel [BEHAVIOR] force someone to attend

dialogue.speaker: Quinn
dialogue.text: Quiet shift today. Only three customers since noon.

dialogue.speaker: Diana
dialogue.text: Same. I reorganised the paper stock just to have something to do.

dialogue.speaker: Diana
dialogue.text: *holds up a customer's credit card* I found this at the machine , I was just copying down the number in case they called back.

dialogue.speaker: Quinn
dialogue.text: You can't do that, Diana. That's a customer's card. Put it straight in the lost property box and tell the manager.

annotation: Diana copies a customer's credit card number at the copy centre, which is a serious breach of trust.

context.setting_description: Two employees take a break in the back room of a copy centre.

norm_text: copy center [BEHAVIOR] make copies of credit cards

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: The bull riding is next , that's always the best part. You coming to watch?

dialogue.speaker: Ravi
dialogue.text: Wouldn't miss it. Last year's was incredible.

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: *shoves Ravi* You were in my spot earlier, weren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: Hey , that's not okay. Someone get the steward. This isn't the place for that.

annotation: Clara shoves another person and starts a physical altercation at the rodeo, which is inappropriate and dangerous.

context.setting_description: Spectators and participants mingle near the arena at a local rodeo event.

dialogue.speaker: Drew
dialogue.text: Good afternoon , picking up Lily? She had a great day. Really engaged in the art activity.

dialogue.speaker: Nina
dialogue.text: That's wonderful, thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Excuse me , I need to flag something. I noticed a bag near the entrance with what looked like a weapon handle sticking out. Not mine.

dialogue.speaker: Drew
dialogue.text: Please follow me immediately. We'll contact the director right away.

annotation: Sam alerts staff to a weapon found near the kindergarten entrance, which is an extremely serious safety concern.

context.setting_description: Parents pick up their children at a kindergarten at the end of the school day.

dialogue.speaker: Rosa
dialogue.text: First time at this tournament? You look a bit nervous.

dialogue.speaker: Ivan
dialogue.text: A little. I've trained hard but you never know on the day.

dialogue.speaker: George
dialogue.text: *walks slowly past Ivan, stares, and sneers* Good luck… you'll need it.

dialogue.speaker: Rosa
dialogue.text: Ignore George. Just focus on your own performance , that's all you can control.

annotation: George pouts and sneers at a competitor before the event, which is unsportsmanlike and disrespectful.

context.setting_description: Competitors prepare backstage before their events at an indoor sports arena.

norm_text: arena [BEHAVIOR] pout at the other competitors

dialogue.speaker: Femi
dialogue.text: I've never been to an opera before. Should I have dressed up more?

dialogue.speaker: Isla
dialogue.text: It's fine , most people are smart casual.

dialogue.speaker: Nico
dialogue.text: *turns around in their seat* I'm sorry , are you wearing shorts? This is opening night.

dialogue.speaker: Femi
dialogue.text: I didn't realise there was a strict dress code. I thought it was just a guideline.

annotation: Femi wears shorts to an opening night opera performance, which many patrons consider disrespectful to the venue's expectations.

context.setting_description: Two friends arrive at an opera house for an evening performance.
context.topic: attending an opening night opera performance

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Nice evening for this. How is everyone doing?

dialogue.speaker: Vera
dialogue.text: Good , just trying to decompress from the week.

dialogue.speaker: Finn
dialogue.text: Same. Hey , while we're all here, I think we should be taxing the wealthy a lot more. The system is completely broken.

dialogue.speaker: Vera
dialogue.text: That's… a strong opener. I'm not sure everyone wants to get into politics right now, Finn.

annotation: Finn launches into an unsolicited political argument at a social gathering, making others uncomfortable.

context.setting_description: A group of friends gathers on an apartment balcony for an evening social.

norm_text: balcony [BEHAVIOR] advocate for higher taxes on the wealthy

dialogue.speaker: Bashir
dialogue.text: I want to make sure we're aligned on how we assign project leads going forward.

dialogue.speaker: Sara
dialogue.text: It should be based on skill fit and rotation , not seniority alone.

dialogue.speaker: Bashir
dialogue.text: Exactly. And we should advocate for equal opportunity at every stage , hiring, promotion, everything.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.text: Fully agree. Let's formalise it so it's actual policy, not just intention.

annotation: Bashir advocates for equality in the workplace, which is constructive and appropriate.

context.setting_description: Team members sit around a table in a conference room for a planning session.
context.topic: discussing team policy on hiring and opportunities

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: That's all sorted , it'll arrive within three to five business days.

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: Perfect. You were really patient with me , I had a lot of questions.

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: Not at all, that's what I'm here for. Anything else I can help with?

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: No, that's everything. Genuinely, thank you so much.

annotation: Victor sincerely thanks the post office worker for their assistance, which is entirely appropriate.

context.setting_description: A customer finishes up at a post office counter after a complicated transaction.

norm_text: post office [BEHAVIOR] thank someone for their help

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: I brought extra pasta if anyone wants some , I always make too much.

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: That's so kind, yes please. I forgot to bring anything today.

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: Me too. Should I grab cutlery from the kitchen, or are we sharing yours?

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: Go ahead and share mine , I don't mind at all. We're all friends here.

annotation: Hana offers to share utensils with colleagues during lunch, which is a perfectly normal gesture.

context.setting_description: Colleagues eat lunch together in a conference room after a long morning meeting.

norm_text: conference room [BEHAVIOR] share utensils with someone

dialogue.speaker: Sara
dialogue.text: Hi , did you find everything okay today?

dialogue.speaker: Bashir
dialogue.text: Mostly, yes. I couldn't find the oat milk , is it still with the regular milk?

dialogue.speaker: Sara
dialogue.text: It moved last week , it's in the health foods aisle now. I'll make a note to update the signs.

dialogue.speaker: Bashir
dialogue.text: Oh great, thanks. Just these today. *places items on belt*

annotation: Sara efficiently rings up a customer's order and provides helpful information, which is entirely appropriate.

context.setting_description: A cashier works the checkout lane during a busy Saturday at a grocery store.
context.topic: processing customer orders at the checkout

dialogue.speaker: Layla
dialogue.text: I've been trying to only buy fair trade this year. Takes longer but feels worth it.

dialogue.speaker: Kofi
dialogue.text: I've been doing the same for coffee and chocolate at least. It adds up though.

dialogue.speaker: Layla
dialogue.text: It does. But I'd rather pay a bit more and know the supply chain is ethical.

dialogue.speaker: Kofi
dialogue.text: Agreed. Have you found a good fair trade olive oil? That one's been tricky for me.

annotation: Layla chooses to buy only fair trade food as a matter of ethical principle, which is entirely appropriate.

context.setting_description: Friends browse the aisles of a grocery store together on a weekday morning.

norm_text: grocery store [BEHAVIOR] buy only fair trade food

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.text: This is perfect. Anyone got a good story?

dialogue.speaker: Sara
dialogue.text: I've got one , though fair warning, some of the details might be… embellished.

dialogue.speaker: Sara
dialogue.text: So last summer I ran into a bear on the trail. It was massive , stared me down for a full minute.

dialogue.speaker: Bashir
dialogue.text: I was there that trip, Sara. It was a raccoon. And it ran away immediately.

annotation: Sara fabricates details about a personal experience around the campfire, exaggerating significantly.

context.setting_description: A group of friends sit around a campfire at a campsite sharing stories.
context.topic: telling stories and catching up around the fire

dialogue.speaker: George
dialogue.text: This one's a great choice , low mileage, full service history.

dialogue.speaker: Rosa
dialogue.text: Does it have the lane-assist feature? That was on my list.

dialogue.speaker: George
dialogue.text: Absolutely , it's got the full driver assistance package.

dialogue.speaker: Ivan
dialogue.text: *steps in* Actually, I just pulled the specs , this trim level doesn't include lane assist. That's only on the top tier.

annotation: George lies to the customer about the car's features in order to make a sale.

context.setting_description: A customer browses cars at a dealership with a salesperson.

norm_text: car dealership [BEHAVIOR] lie about the features of a car

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: We need to go through a few standard questions. Have you brought any medication with you?

dialogue.speaker: Vera
dialogue.text: No, nothing. Just my personal items.

dialogue.speaker: Finn
dialogue.text: *quietly to Morgan* They do have medication , I saw them pack it. You should ask again.

dialogue.speaker: Vera
dialogue.text: I said I don't have anything. Can we move on?

annotation: Vera hides medication from staff during a mental health facility intake, which is a serious safety concern.

context.setting_description: A patient is admitted to a mental health facility and checked in by a staff member.

norm_text: mental institution [BEHAVIOR] hide something from staff

dialogue.speaker: Layla
dialogue.text: I'm popping out for a five-minute break. Can you watch the front?

dialogue.speaker: Kofi
dialogue.text: Sure. *opens the cash register and looks inside*

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.text: *enters from the back office* Kofi , why is the register open? Only managers are supposed to access that.

dialogue.speaker: Kofi
dialogue.text: I was just checking if we were running low on change. I thought it was fine.

annotation: Kofi opens the cash register without authorisation at the gift shop, which is a breach of trust.

context.setting_description: A staff member is near the register area of a gift shop during a quiet shift.
context.topic: tidying up during a quiet shift

norm_text: gift shop [BEHAVIOR] open the cash register

dialogue.speaker: Erik
dialogue.text: Can you start closing out the till? I'll finish labelling the display stock.

dialogue.speaker: Dani
dialogue.text: On it. *opens the register and begins counting*

dialogue.speaker: Yara
dialogue.text: *walks in from the back* Hey , Dani, you're not supposed to be counting the register. That's a manager role only.

dialogue.speaker: Dani
dialogue.text: Oh , Erik asked me to. I didn't realise it wasn't my job.

annotation: Dani counts the cash register without proper authorisation, which violates shop policy.

context.setting_description: Two employees work behind the counter at a camera shop at closing time.

norm_text: camera shop [BEHAVIOR] count the money in the register

dialogue.speaker: Carlos
dialogue.text: You're next , about ten minutes. Can I get you anything while you wait?

dialogue.speaker: Aya
dialogue.text: No thanks. *closes eyes and leans back, pretending to sleep*

dialogue.speaker: Fatima
dialogue.text: Carlos , is Aya actually asleep? They're not responding.

dialogue.speaker: Carlos
dialogue.text: Aya? *waves hand* Nope , definitely pretending. Aya, we can see you're awake.

annotation: Aya pretends to be asleep in a barbershop to avoid conversation, which is considered rude to staff.

context.setting_description: A client sits in a barber's chair at a busy barbershop.
context.topic: waiting during a busy afternoon at the barbershop

norm_text: barber shop or beauty salon [BEHAVIOR] pretend to be asleep

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: Did you sort out your tuition payment for next semester yet?

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: Not yet. I was thinking of taking out student loans , I'd rather not, but the fees are just too high.

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: Most people in our situation do. It's not shameful , it's just reality. Read the repayment terms carefully though.

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: Agreed. There's no other way for a lot of students.

annotation: Alice considers taking out student loans, which is a normal financial decision and not a norm violation in context.

context.setting_description: Students talk between classes on a university campus quad.
context.topic: discussing finances and upcoming semester fees

dialogue.speaker: Miguel
dialogue.text: Before we close , any questions about today's material?

dialogue.speaker: Aisha
dialogue.text: Not a question exactly, but , I wanted to invite anyone interested to come to our church's open evening this Friday. It's really welcoming.

dialogue.speaker: Yuki
dialogue.text: *quietly to Aisha* That's probably not the right setting for that.

dialogue.speaker: Miguel
dialogue.text: Let's keep announcements to academic matters in here. You're welcome to share that outside class, Aisha.

annotation: Aisha invites classmates to a religious event during a university lecture, which is inappropriate in an academic setting.

context.setting_description: A university lecturer addresses students near the end of a class session.
context.topic: wrapping up a lecture on social ethics

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: Going up?

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: Yes , twelve, please.

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: Did you all catch that segment on religion in public life on the news last night? I thought it raised some important points.

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: *shifts uncomfortably* It's a bit heavy for the lift, isn't it?

annotation: Victor brings up religion in a small elevator, making other passengers uncomfortable in an enclosed space.

context.setting_description: Several people ride an elevator together in an office building.
context.topic: a brief elevator ride between floors

dialogue.speaker: Aya
dialogue.text: Same as last time? Taper on the sides, bit shorter on top?

dialogue.speaker: Carlos
dialogue.text: Yeah that works. *mutters offensive language under their breath, then louder* This traffic today was absolute , *uses slur*

dialogue.speaker: Fatima
dialogue.text: Carlos , there are other customers in here. Keep it clean, please.

dialogue.speaker: Aya
dialogue.text: Appreciate that, Fatima. Carlos, I'll have to ask you to watch your language in here.

annotation: Carlos uses offensive language in a barbershop, making staff and other customers uncomfortable.

context.setting_description: A client sits in a barber's chair getting a haircut.
context.topic: getting a haircut at the local barbershop

norm_text: barber shop or beauty salon [BEHAVIOR] use offensive language

dialogue.speaker: Zoe
dialogue.text: The court will now hear the defendant's final statement.

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.text: Thank you, Your Honour. I want to say clearly , I did what I was accused of. I'm not going to pretend otherwise.

dialogue.speaker: Raj
dialogue.text: *quietly* That took courage. You don't see that often.

dialogue.speaker: Zoe
dialogue.text: The court acknowledges the statement. We will proceed to sentencing.

annotation: Mia honestly admits to wrongdoing before the court, which is appropriate and morally admirable.

context.setting_description: A defendant stands before a judge in a courthouse after a long trial.

dialogue.speaker: Zoe
dialogue.text: Do you swear to tell the truth, the whole truth, and nothing but the truth?

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.text: I do.

dialogue.speaker: Raj
dialogue.text: *to colleague in the gallery* That's always such a loaded moment, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Zoe
dialogue.text: You may be seated. Counsel, you may proceed.

annotation: Mia swears to tell the truth in court, which is the expected and appropriate action.

context.setting_description: A witness prepares to testify in a civil case at a courthouse.

norm_text: courthouse [BEHAVIOR] swear to tell the truth

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: Before everyone heads off , Hugo, did you update the site records for today's pour?

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: Done. I logged the batch number, mix ratio, and cure time. All accurate.

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: Ravi, anything to add from the east wing?

dialogue.speaker: Ravi
dialogue.text: Just the scaffold check , completed and signed off. Everything's current.

annotation: Hugo maintains accurate records at a construction site, which is responsible and expected professional behaviour.

context.setting_description: Workers on a construction site gather at the end of a shift.

dialogue.speaker: Drew
dialogue.text: Can you tell me exactly what you saw and at what time?

dialogue.speaker: Nina
dialogue.text: Yes , I was walking past around half seven. I heard a loud noise, looked over, and saw the window was broken. That's when I called it in.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I can corroborate that , I was just behind them and saw the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Drew
dialogue.text: Good. We'll need full written statements from both of you. Thank you for coming forward.

annotation: Nina makes an accurate report to police at a crime scene, which is entirely appropriate and socially responsible.

context.setting_description: Officers and bystanders stand near a taped-off crime scene.

dialogue.speaker: Finn
dialogue.text: Okay , everyone has to share something they've never told the group. Vera, you first.

dialogue.speaker: Vera
dialogue.text: Alright, fine. I'll talk about my ex. We dated for three years and the split was really messy , I think about it more than I'd like to admit.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: That's really honest of you. Thanks for sharing that.

dialogue.speaker: Finn
dialogue.text: I think we've all been there in some way. You okay?

annotation: Vera shares personal feelings about a past relationship at a campfire, which is normal in an intimate group setting.

context.setting_description: Friends sit around a campfire on the last night of a camping trip.
context.topic: sharing personal stories around the fire

dialogue.speaker: Yara
dialogue.text: Good evening , please come in. Service begins in about five minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Erik
dialogue.text: Thank you. *a weapon is visible in their bag as they approach the entrance*

dialogue.speaker: Yara
dialogue.text: I'm sorry , I need to ask you to leave that bag outside. We don't allow any weapons on the premises.

dialogue.speaker: Erik
dialogue.text: It's a tool for work. I didn't realise. I'll leave it at the door.

annotation: Erik attempts to enter a church with a weapon, which is strictly forbidden.

context.setting_description: Worshippers arrive for an evening service at a local church.

norm_text: church or chapel [BEHAVIOR] enter with a weapon

dialogue.speaker: Zara
dialogue.text: This space is incredible. How old is the altar itself?

dialogue.speaker: Mei
dialogue.text: The original structure dates to the fourteenth century. Please keep voices low and refrain from touching the fixtures.

dialogue.speaker: Ethan
dialogue.text: *sits down on the altar steps, pulls out a novel, and begins reading*

dialogue.speaker: Mei
dialogue.text: Excuse me , this is a sacred space. Reading personal materials at the altar isn't appropriate here.

annotation: Ethan casually reads a book while seated at a sacred altar, which is disrespectful.

context.setting_description: A visitor explores a historic altar space in a cathedral open to tourists.

dialogue.speaker: Aisha
dialogue.text: We need to get this section finished before the inspector comes through tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Miguel
dialogue.text: I've got the angle grinder set up. Ready to cut when you are.

dialogue.speaker: Yuki
dialogue.text: *stops work* Wait , Miguel, did you sign out that equipment? And is your PPE certified for metal cutting?

dialogue.speaker: Miguel
dialogue.text: I thought I was cleared. Aisha told me to start.

annotation: Miguel begins cutting metal on a construction site without confirmed authorisation or proper safety sign-off.

context.setting_description: Workers carry out tasks at an active construction site.

dialogue.speaker: Alice
dialogue.text: These are my lucky ones , I'm here every Friday. Are you new to the floor?

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: First time, yeah. *sits down at a machine and starts playing without checking in or registering*

dialogue.speaker: Hana
dialogue.text: *approaches* Excuse me , I need to see your registration card. You need to be signed up to play.

dialogue.speaker: Victor
dialogue.text: Oh , I didn't know you had to register. I'll go sort that now.

annotation: Victor plays slots at a casino without being registered, which violates venue rules.

context.setting_description: A person approaches the slot machine area in a busy casino.

dialogue.speaker: Tariq
dialogue.text: Listen up. You'll be in pairs for the navigation exercise. No deviation from the assigned route. Clear?

dialogue.speaker: Diana
dialogue.text: Clear, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Quinn
dialogue.text: With respect , I don't think the assigned route makes sense. I'm going to take a different one.

dialogue.speaker: Tariq
dialogue.text: That is not a request, soldier. You follow orders or you sit out. Which is it?

annotation: Quinn openly disobeys a direct order from a commanding officer at an army base.

context.setting_description: Soldiers are briefed by a commanding officer at an army base.
context.topic: receiving orders before a training exercise

dialogue.speaker: Rosa
dialogue.text: This installation is extraordinary. I love how the light shifts across it.

dialogue.speaker: George
dialogue.text: Right? I want to remember every detail. *pulls out phone and starts photographing*

dialogue.speaker: Ivan
dialogue.text: *approaches* Excuse me , photography in this gallery requires prior permission. There are signs at the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: George
dialogue.text: Oh , I didn't see them. I'm sorry. I'll put it away.

annotation: George takes photos in an art gallery without permission, ignoring the clearly posted policy.

context.setting_description: Visitors browse a contemporary art gallery on a weekday afternoon.

norm_text: art gallery [BEHAVIOR] take pictures without permission

dialogue.speaker: Zara
dialogue.text: I thought we could decorate the hall for the holidays , nothing too extravagant.

dialogue.speaker: Ethan
dialogue.text: I love that idea. Lights, maybe a tree?

dialogue.speaker: Mei
dialogue.text: *clears throat* The church leadership hasn't approved secular holiday decorations in this space. We'd need to go through the committee first.

dialogue.speaker: Zara
dialogue.text: Oh , I didn't realise that needed approval. We'll hold off then.

annotation: Zara proposes celebrating holidays in a church space without obtaining the necessary permission from leadership.

context.setting_description: A congregation gathers in a church hall after the service for a social event.
context.topic: organising a holiday celebration in the church hall

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: The water's really nice today. Not too cold.

dialogue.speaker: Amara
dialogue.text: Good to hear. I want to do laps but this end looks busy.

dialogue.speaker: Liu
dialogue.text: *climbs up to the edge and jumps in as a cannonball, drenching Tom and Amara*

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Hey , cannonballs aren't allowed in this pool. There are kids nearby.

annotation: Liu does a cannonball at a public pool where the behaviour is prohibited, drenching nearby swimmers.

context.setting_description: Swimmers gather at a public pool on a weekend afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: The architecture in here is breathtaking. Is that the main altar?

dialogue.speaker: Nina
dialogue.text: I think so , there's a barrier though. We're not meant to go past it.

dialogue.speaker: Drew
dialogue.text: *ducks under the rope and kneels at the altar* I just want to pay my respects here.

dialogue.speaker: Nina
dialogue.text: I don't think visitors are allowed past the rope, Drew. The guide said to stay on this side.

annotation: Drew crosses into a restricted altar area and kneels there, violating visitor rules for the sacred space.

context.setting_description: Tourists visit a cathedral and approach a cordoned altar area.
context.topic: exploring the historic interior of a cathedral

dialogue.speaker: Jade
dialogue.text: Before we go , Tara, can you log the microscope readings and clean the slides?

dialogue.speaker: Tara
dialogue.text: On it. Do you want me to run the autoclave cycle as well?

dialogue.speaker: Leo
dialogue.text: I already started it. I also wiped down the benches and put the specimen jars back in storage.

dialogue.speaker: Jade
dialogue.text: Good work, both of you. That's exactly the standard we need.

annotation: Tara and Leo maintain and clean lab equipment at the end of the session, which is entirely expected and appropriate.

context.setting_description: Lab assistants work in a university biology laboratory at the end of a session.

norm_text: biology laboratory [BEHAVIOR] maintain and clean the lab equipment

dialogue.speaker: Drew
dialogue.text: Lights out in fifteen. Everyone to their cells.

dialogue.speaker: Nina
dialogue.text: *to Sam* That's us. Come on.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Already? *sighs* Fine. *follows the order and heads to their cell*

dialogue.speaker: Drew
dialogue.text: Move it, both of you. No delays tonight.

annotation: Sam complies with the officer's orders in a prison, which is the expected and required behaviour.

context.setting_description: An officer oversees inmates in a correctional facility common room.

dialogue.speaker: Yuki
dialogue.text: The doctor's signed off on your discharge plan. Take these twice a day with food and avoid strenuous activity for two weeks.

dialogue.speaker: Aisha
dialogue.text: Understood. I'll set reminders on my phone.

dialogue.speaker: Miguel
dialogue.text: Aisha, make sure you actually follow it this time. Last time you stopped the antibiotics early.

dialogue.speaker: Aisha
dialogue.text: I know, I know. I'll follow the doctor's orders properly this time.

annotation: Aisha commits to following the doctor's orders, which is entirely appropriate.

context.setting_description: A patient recovers in a hospital room after minor surgery.

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: *blows whistle* Hey , no running on the pool deck, please.

dialogue.speaker: Rex
dialogue.text: Sorry! *slows down immediately*

dialogue.speaker: Suki
dialogue.text: Maya, that group over there is in the lap lane without a pass. Should I flag it?

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: Yes , please ask them to move to the open swim area. Thanks for noticing.

annotation: Maya enforces pool rules as a lifeguard, which is their responsibility and entirely appropriate.

context.setting_description: A lifeguard monitors swimmers at a public pool on a busy afternoon.
context.topic: enforcing safety rules at the pool

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: Good morning , fires are only permitted in designated areas, and dogs must stay on leads on the main trails.

dialogue.speaker: Rex
dialogue.text: Noted. We've got a dog , we'll keep him leashed.

dialogue.speaker: Suki
dialogue.text: What about the side trails? We were hoping to let him off for a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Maya
dialogue.text: The eastern loop allows off-lead dogs , just pick up after him and stay on marked paths.

annotation: Maya enforces park rules clearly and helpfully, which is exactly their role as a park ranger.

context.setting_description: A park ranger checks in with visitors near the entrance of a nature reserve.

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: Let's begin with a few grounding breaths. Sit comfortably and close your eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: *whispers to Ravi* I always feel better just being in this space.

dialogue.speaker: Ravi
dialogue.text: *nods quietly and follows Hugo's lead, settling into position*

dialogue.speaker: Hugo
dialogue.text: Now slowly extend your spine , reach long through the crown of your head. Good.

annotation: Ravi quietly follows the yoga instructor's instructions, which is the appropriate and expected behaviour.

context.setting_description: Students warm up at the start of a yoga class in a studio.
context.topic: beginning of a morning yoga session

norm_text: yoga studio [BEHAVIOR] follow the instructor's instructions
